title: Brainfile Task Schema
description: Schema for standalone task documents. Each task is an individual .md file with YAML frontmatter (structured metadata) and an optional markdown body (narrative, log entries). Active tasks live in .brainfile/tasks/, completed tasks in .brainfile/logs/.

column.description: Column ID this task belongs to. References a column.id in the board file. Required for active tasks in tasks/. Omitted for completed tasks in logs/ (replaced by completedAt).

position.description: Sort order within the column. Lower numbers appear first. Tasks without position are sorted after positioned tasks.

description.description: Detailed task description (supports Markdown). This is the single source of truth for context and background - contracts should not duplicate this.

assignee.description: Task assignee. Convention: external agents use plain names (codex, cursor, gemini, claude, human), internal subagents use @ prefix (@research, @review).

tags.description: Task tags for filtering and categorization

blockedBy.description: List of task IDs that block this task

updatedAt.description: When the task was last updated

completedAt.description: When the task was completed. Set automatically when a task file is moved from tasks/ to logs/.

relatedFiles.description: Related file paths or code locations. This is the single source of truth for relevant files - contracts should not duplicate this.

template.description: Task template type used to create this task
